channel.title: coderator.dev
channel.description: Writing about Java, Spring Boot, design patterns, and software craftsmanship.

item.title: A seemingly simple question: What are design patterns?
item.description: Before debating whether design patterns are dead or alive, we should first agree on what they actually are. Spoiler: the answer is broader than the GoF book.

item.title: How to Make Your Reviewer Cry Using Java Optional
item.description: Four common Java Optional pitfalls I keep seeing in code reviews — from old-fashioned isPresent/get patterns to the philosophical crime of orElse(null).

item.title: Sluggish Spring Boot Tests Riddle
item.description: How a nagging belief that integration tests are inherently slow turned out to be fixable — cutting our build time from 10 minutes to 4.
